_instructions: GENERIC EXAMPLE. Read the project's actual scripts. Fill in: (1) player_group from where player adds itself; (2) input_actions_to_fuzz from InputMap or from what the player script reads; (3) invariants from actual numeric properties in the player (position, velocity, health, ammo, etc.) — guess bounds by reading the code (max health, max ammo, screen size, etc.). Do not copy-paste. Understand the game first.

invariants.note: Read the player script and determine realistic bounds for this property
